name: Black Russian Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Tia Maria or cream de cacao
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients for the cake in a large bowl.
2. Blend with a mixer on low speed until combined.
3. Increase the mixer speed to high and beat for 2 minutes more.
4. Grease and flour a Bundt pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for at least 10 minutes before turning it out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
8. Prepare the milk chocolate frosting by combining all ingredients in a small mixing bowl.
9. Beat the mixture on low speed until smooth, then increase the speed to high and beat for an additional minute.
10. Add a few drops of water at a time until the frosting reaches the desired spreading consistency.
11. Once the cake has cooled, frost with the prepared milk chocolate frosting.
